docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-05-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANH, PRISCILLA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2009 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
